  • Personal Information

    16. Answer this question only after reviewing a description of the job(s) applied for*
      Are you able to perform the functions of the job(s) for which you are applying; with or without accommodation?
    18. If you are 18 years of age or younger and still in High School, can you furnish a work permit?
    22. Have you ever worked for the City of Lancaster?*
    26. Where did you hear about this position?
    30. Are you eligible to work in the United States?*
    32. Type of employment desired*

    Immigration and Naturalization Information

    2. We employ only United States citizens and aliens lawfully authorized to work in the United States. In compliance with Immigration Reform and Control Act of 1986, we require all new employees to complete the employment eligibility verification form (I-9) and to provide legally sufficent documentation of identiy and employment eligibility.
      Are you legally eligible to work in the United States?
    4. Continue |Go Back

    2. Do you hold a valid Ohio Driver's License?

    Employment History

    2. Please list your past work experience beginning with your most recent employment. Military experience and volunteer work may also be included as employment.
      NOTE: In order to be considered for employment, you must fill in the information below, accurately and completely. You may submit a resume in addition to completing this section. Exclude any groups, which indicate race, color, religion, gender, national origin, or disability.
    10. May we contact your previous supervisor for a reference?
    29. May we contact your previous supervisor for a reference?
    48. May we contact your previous supervisor for a reference?
    59. Continue |Go Back

    References

    2. Please list three professional references.
    26. Continue |Go Back

    Disclaimer & Signature

    2. I certify that my answers are true and complete to the best of my knowledge and that intentional misrepresentations or omissions may be cause for the rejection of my application and that if hired I may be released from employment.

      I understand that the company may require me to successfully complete a pre-employment drug and alcohol test and a background check as a condition of employment and that continued employment may be based on the successful completion of similar tests.

      Your electronic signature below indicates your agreement with the following statements: By typing my name in the following box and clicking submit button I certify the above statements to be true and correct, to the best of my knowledge, and that this information can be used for the purpose of processing my employment application and information.
      5. Leave This Blank:

    6. This field is not part of the form submission.
